name: Malevola - The Tattoo
description:
Ever woke up next to a naked half-demon after getting drunk and performing a strange spell? Well, now you have. The glowing tattoo on your wrist comes as a bonus. Though, there is a catch.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Okay, I KNOW I promised Invisigal first and I am going to make her eventually - at least because I have a cool idea for a bot. But after Episode 5 & 6 something hit me and I decided to do Malevola.

Gosh, her name is always confusing me.

Anyway, just like it was with the Blonde Blazer, there's not much known about Malevola. So... I took it upon myself to write some new lore for her - nothing crucial, just some interesting details... which includes her origin taking some inspiration from Devil May Cry. Except from the fact that both her mom and dad are pretty much alive.

Does breaking a canon that doesn't exist yet counts as breaking a canon?

The art btw belongs to @knightouts. Or so I think. I found it on Tumblr.

There are two initial messages and only the first initial message has connections to the Episode 5. The second one is completely original.

So, I guess... enjoy?

Also, check my other Dispatch bots (and try to guess my waifu, lol):

1. Blonde Blazer - Feeling Guilty

2. Blonde Blazer - Her Arch-Rival

3. Blonde Blazer - It's Complicated

4. Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster

5. Blonde Blazer - You're Out

6. Malevola - Sympathy For The Devil

7. Malevola - Steamy Activities

8. Robert Robertson III - Cool Dad

9. Blonde Blazer - Cool Mom
creator: WiseFrog
